status: REVIEW ARTIFACT - recovery behavior NOT implemented
phi: none - all identifiers, orders, specimens, and results are synthetic
notes: This corpus encodes the frozen v1.1 design's expected failure classification and recovery policy for each approved failure code. It defines fixtures and expected metadata only; it does NOT implement recovery services, schema changes, or executable tests.

Expected metadata (failure_code, failure_category, recovery_policy, expected_queue_status, permitted_recovery_actions) is transcribed from the frozen design record mapping (section 6) and recovery rules (sections 7-8), not produced by running the parser.

The current Session-3 inbound parser stores each failed message as ERRORED and routes it to interface_error_queue with a free-text reason and status OPEN; it does not yet emit failure_code, failure_category, recovery_policy, or the TERMINAL queue status. Those v1.1 fields are unimplemented and are represented here only as design-dictated expectations for review.
expected_original_message_status is ERRORED for every case: the original failed message is preserved and is never updated to FILED (only a new recovery message may reach FILED).

cases.isolated_failure_trigger: The payload is empty (zero bytes); the parser finds no HL7 segments and raises before any segment, order, specimen, or OBX check runs.
cases.synthetic_setup: For the corrected re-drive only: synthetic patient SYN-8101 and an AML/MDS FISH lab_order on accession ACC-REC-0101 in a non-terminal (IN_PROCESS) status with an accessioned bone-marrow specimen. The empty original needs no database state to fail.
cases.successful_recovery_prerequisite: A corrected re-drive supplies a well-formed message for an existing OPEN order (ACC-REC-0101); the single successful re-drive transitions the queue OPEN -> RESOLVED.
data_that_must_remain_unchanged: interface_message.status (remains ERRORED; never updated to FILED)

cases.isolated_failure_trigger: The required SPM segment is omitted. MSH, PID, OBR, and OBX are all present, so the message parses up to the required-segment check and fails only because SPM is missing.
cases.synthetic_setup: For the corrected re-drive: synthetic patient SYN-8201 and an AML/MDS FISH lab_order on accession ACC-REC-0201 in a non-terminal (IN_PROCESS) status with an accessioned bone-marrow specimen.
cases.successful_recovery_prerequisite: A corrected re-drive restores the SPM segment; with the matching OPEN order present the re-drive files and the queue transitions OPEN -> RESOLVED.
data_that_must_remain_unchanged: interface_message.status (remains ERRORED; never updated to FILED)

cases.isolated_failure_trigger: Every required segment (MSH, PID, OBR, SPM) is present but the message carries no OBX result segments, so it fails the no-result check.
cases.synthetic_setup: For the corrected re-drive: synthetic patient SYN-8301 and an AML/MDS FISH lab_order on accession ACC-REC-0301 in a non-terminal (IN_PROCESS) status with an accessioned bone-marrow specimen.
cases.successful_recovery_prerequisite: A corrected re-drive adds valid OBX result segments; with the matching OPEN order the re-drive files and the queue transitions OPEN -> RESOLVED.
data_that_must_remain_unchanged: interface_message.status (remains ERRORED; never updated to FILED)

cases.isolated_failure_trigger: OBR-3 (the accession) is empty. The message parses cleanly, then order matching fails immediately because there is no accession to match.
cases.synthetic_setup: For the corrected re-drive: synthetic patient SYN-8401 and an AML/MDS FISH lab_order on accession ACC-REC-0401 in a non-terminal (IN_PROCESS) status with an accessioned bone-marrow specimen.
cases.successful_recovery_prerequisite: A corrected re-drive fills OBR-3 with the matching accession ACC-REC-0401; the re-drive files and the queue transitions OPEN -> RESOLVED.
data_that_must_remain_unchanged: interface_message.status (remains ERRORED; never updated to FILED)

cases.isolated_failure_trigger: The message is syntactically valid and specimen-compatible, but its accession ACC-REC-0500-NOMATCH matches no lab_order at ingest time.
cases.synthetic_setup: At failure time no lab_order exists for ACC-REC-0500-NOMATCH. RETRY_ORIGINAL prerequisite: a synthetic patient and a matching AML/MDS FISH lab_order on accession ACC-REC-0500-NOMATCH later exists in a non-terminal (IN_PROCESS) status with an accessioned bone-marrow specimen. REDRIVE_CORRECTED alternative: a separate synthetic AML/MDS FISH lab_order on accession ACC-REC-0501 in a non-terminal status already exists.
cases.successful_recovery_prerequisite: RETRY_ORIGINAL: the unchanged original payload is retried after a matching OPEN order for ACC-REC-0500-NOMATCH becomes available. REDRIVE_CORRECTED: a corrected payload points OBR-3 at the existing OPEN order ACC-REC-0501. Either single success transitions the queue OPEN -> RESOLVED.
data_that_must_remain_unchanged: interface_message.status (remains ERRORED; never updated to FILED)

cases.isolated_failure_trigger: The message is valid and matches lab_order ACC-REC-0601, but that order is already FINALIZED, so results cannot be filed.
cases.synthetic_setup: Synthetic patient SYN-8601 and an AML/MDS FISH lab_order on accession ACC-REC-0601 in FINALIZED status (with its finalized report).
cases.successful_recovery_prerequisite: None. The failure is TERMINAL: no recovery action is permitted and no corrected payload exists. Recovery never reopens or unfinalizes the order; the queue item is TERMINAL.
data_that_must_remain_unchanged: interface_message.status (remains ERRORED; never updated to FILED)
matched lab_order.status (never reopened, unfinalized, or uncancelled)

cases.isolated_failure_trigger: The message is valid and matches lab_order ACC-REC-0701, but that order is CANCELLED, so results cannot be filed.
cases.synthetic_setup: Synthetic patient SYN-8701 and an AML/MDS FISH lab_order on accession ACC-REC-0701 in CANCELLED status.
cases.successful_recovery_prerequisite: None. The failure is TERMINAL: no recovery action is permitted and no corrected payload exists. Recovery never reopens or uncancels the order; the queue item is TERMINAL.
data_that_must_remain_unchanged: interface_message.status (remains ERRORED; never updated to FILED)
matched lab_order.status (never reopened, unfinalized, or uncancelled)

cases.isolated_failure_trigger: The message matches OPEN order ACC-REC-0801, but SPM-4 carries an unknown specimen code (ZZZ) that maps to no internal specimen type.
cases.synthetic_setup: Synthetic patient SYN-8801 and an AML/MDS FISH lab_order on accession ACC-REC-0801 in a non-terminal (IN_PROCESS) status with an accessioned bone-marrow specimen.
cases.successful_recovery_prerequisite: A corrected re-drive sets SPM-4 to a recognized bone-marrow code (BMA); the re-drive files and the queue transitions OPEN -> RESOLVED.
data_that_must_remain_unchanged: interface_message.status (remains ERRORED; never updated to FILED)

cases.isolated_failure_trigger: The message matches OPEN order ACC-REC-0901, and SPM-4 is a recognized peripheral-blood code (PB), which is incompatible with the bone-marrow AML/MDS FISH panel.
cases.synthetic_setup: Synthetic patient SYN-8901 and an AML/MDS FISH lab_order on accession ACC-REC-0901 in a non-terminal (IN_PROCESS) status. The AML/MDS FISH panel requires BONE_MARROW.
cases.successful_recovery_prerequisite: A corrected re-drive sets SPM-4 to the compatible bone-marrow code (BMA); the re-drive files and the queue transitions OPEN -> RESOLVED.
data_that_must_remain_unchanged: interface_message.status (remains ERRORED; never updated to FILED)

cases.isolated_failure_trigger: The message matches OPEN order ACC-REC-1001 with a compatible specimen; the second OBX has an empty OBX-3 (no probe code). Filing is all-or-nothing, so the missing probe code fails the whole message.
cases.synthetic_setup: Synthetic patient SYN-9001 and an AML/MDS FISH lab_order on accession ACC-REC-1001 in a non-terminal (IN_PROCESS) status with an accessioned bone-marrow specimen.
cases.successful_recovery_prerequisite: A corrected re-drive supplies a probe code in the offending OBX-3; the re-drive files and the queue transitions OPEN -> RESOLVED.
data_that_must_remain_unchanged: interface_message.status (remains ERRORED; never updated to FILED)

cases.isolated_failure_trigger: The message matches OPEN order ACC-REC-1101 with a compatible specimen; the second OBX names probe code NOTAPROBE, which is not part of the AML/MDS FISH panel.
cases.synthetic_setup: Synthetic patient SYN-9101 and an AML/MDS FISH lab_order on accession ACC-REC-1101 in a non-terminal (IN_PROCESS) status with an accessioned bone-marrow specimen.
cases.successful_recovery_prerequisite: A corrected re-drive replaces NOTAPROBE with a valid panel probe code; the re-drive files and the queue transitions OPEN -> RESOLVED.
data_that_must_remain_unchanged: interface_message.status (remains ERRORED; never updated to FILED)

cases.isolated_failure_trigger: The message matches OPEN order ACC-REC-1201 with a valid probe; the second OBX packs a non-integer cells_scored value (xx) in OBX-5.
cases.synthetic_setup: Synthetic patient SYN-9201 and an AML/MDS FISH lab_order on accession ACC-REC-1201 in a non-terminal (IN_PROCESS) status with an accessioned bone-marrow specimen.
cases.successful_recovery_prerequisite: A corrected re-drive supplies an integer cells_scored value; the re-drive files and the queue transitions OPEN -> RESOLVED.
data_that_must_remain_unchanged: interface_message.status (remains ERRORED; never updated to FILED)

cases.isolated_failure_trigger: The message matches OPEN order ACC-REC-1301 with a valid probe; the second OBX reports 150 abnormal cells against only 100 scored, so abnormal exceeds scored.
cases.synthetic_setup: Synthetic patient SYN-9301 and an AML/MDS FISH lab_order on accession ACC-REC-1301 in a non-terminal (IN_PROCESS) status with an accessioned bone-marrow specimen.
cases.successful_recovery_prerequisite: A corrected re-drive supplies counts where abnormal does not exceed scored; the re-drive files and the queue transitions OPEN -> RESOLVED.
data_that_must_remain_unchanged: interface_message.status (remains ERRORED; never updated to FILED)

cases.isolated_failure_trigger: The message matches OPEN order ACC-REC-1401 with a valid probe and counts; the second OBX carries interpretation EQUIVOCAL, which is not one of NORMAL, ABNORMAL, or INDETERMINATE.
cases.synthetic_setup: Synthetic patient SYN-9401 and an AML/MDS FISH lab_order on accession ACC-REC-1401 in a non-terminal (IN_PROCESS) status with an accessioned bone-marrow specimen.
cases.successful_recovery_prerequisite: A corrected re-drive supplies a valid interpretation; the re-drive files and the queue transitions OPEN -> RESOLVED.
data_that_must_remain_unchanged: interface_message.status (remains ERRORED; never updated to FILED)
